ID | Description | Steps to Reproduce: | Actual Result: | Expected Result: | Severity | Priority | Attachment |   |   |   |   |   |   |   |   |   |   |   |   |   |   |   |   |  
BG1 | In this bug, the page becomes unresponsive when clicking on the numbers of results. | 1.Open https://academybugs.com
2.Click the Find Bugs link on the navigation bar
3.Click on the buttons to show a certain number of results at the top left | The page freezes when clicking on the numbers of results | The selected number of results is displayed according to the clicked buttons | High | 1 | [https://academybugs.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/21.png](https://academybugs.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/21.png) |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  | 
BG2 | In this bug, the image is not completely displayed. | Open https://academybugs.com
Click the Find Bugs link on the navigation bar
Click on "Dark Grey Jeans" | The image has a white space on the right | The product image fills the box entirely | Medium | 2 | [https://academybugs.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/6.png](https://academybugs.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/6.png) |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  | 
BG3 | In this bug, the caption of the Sign In button is misaligned vertically. | Open https://academybugs.com
Click the Find Bugs link on the navigation bar
Open a product
Scroll to the bottom and find the sign in form in the right side menu
Enter any login and password that are not registered and click "Sign In" | The caption of the Sign In button is misaligned vertically | The caption of the Sign In button is centered vertically | Low | 3 | [https://academybugs.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/7.png](https://academybugs.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/7.png) |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  | 
BG4 | In this bug, the text under the New User section is not in English. | Open https://academybugs.com
Click the Find Bugs link on the navigation bar
Open a product
Scroll down to the bottom of the right side menu
Click "Sign In" to open the sign in page | The text under the New User section is in another language | The text under the New User section is in English | Low | 3 | [https://academybugs.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/11.png](https://academybugs.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/11.png) |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  | 
BG5 | In this bug, the page becomes unresponsive when clicking on the Post Comment button. | Open https://academybugs.com
Click the Find Bugs link on the navigation bar
Open a product
Scroll down to the Leave a Reply section
Fill out the comment form
Click "Post Comment" | The page becomes unresponsive when clicking on "Post Comment" | The comment is posted under the product | High | 1 | [https://academybugs.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/23.png](https://academybugs.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/23.png) |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  | 
BG6 | In this bug, the manufacturer link in the product details page is broken. | Open https://academybugs.com
Click the Find Bugs link on the navigation bar
Open a product
Click the manufacturer link under the quantity | The manufacturer link opens an error page | The manufacturer link shows an appropriate page | Medium | 2 | [https://academybugs.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/11/Fn3.png](https://academybugs.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/11/Fn3.png) |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  | 
BG7 | In this bug, the product quantity cannot be increased past 2. | Open https://academybugs.com
Click the Find Bugs link on the navigation bar
Add one or more products to the cart
Click the "View cart" link on top of the page
Set the products quantity to 3 or more
Click "update" below | When clicking on the update button the product quantity becomes 2 again | The product quantity can be increased past 2 | High | 1 | [https://academybugs.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/1.png](https://academybugs.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/1.png) |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  | 
BG8 | In this bug, the filter by price doesn't work in the product details or product list pages. | Open https://academybugs.com
Click the Find Bugs link on the navigation bar
Open a product
On the right side menu find the Filter by Price section
Select any of the price ranges
Also open any item from the right side Store Menu and select the price ranges on the right side menu | The same page reloads | A list of products in the selected price range is shown | Medium | 2 | [https://academybugs.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/F4.png](https://academybugs.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/F4.png) |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  | 
BG9 | In this bug, the product quantity cannot be increased past 2. | Open https://academybugs.com
Click the Find Bugs link on the navigation bar
Add one or more products to the cart
Click the "View cart" link on top of the page
Set the products quantity to 3 or more
Click "update" below | When clicking on the update button the product quantity becomes 2 again | The product quantity can be increased past 2 | High | 1 | [https://academybugs.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/1.png](https://academybugs.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/1.png) |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  | 
BG10 | In this bug, there is big space before the last letter in "Return to Store". | Open https://academybugs.com
Click the Find Bugs link on the navigation bar
Open a product
Open the cart at the bottom of right side menu
Clear the cart if there are any items | There is too much space before the last letter in "Return to Store" | The caption of the "Return to Store" button is written with even spacing between letters | Low | 3 | [https://academybugs.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/15.png](https://academybugs.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/15.png) |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  | 
BG11 | In this bug, the page freezes when changing the currency. | Open https://academybugs.com
Click the Find Bugs link on the navigation bar
Open a product
Change the currency in the right side menu | The page freezes when changing the currency | The currency is changed as expected | High | 1 | [https://academybugs.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/22.png](https://academybugs.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/22.png) |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  | 
BG12 | in this bug ,currency dropdown is not working | Open https://academybugs.com
Click the Find Bugs link on the navigation bar
Open a product
Change the currency in the right side menu | The page freezes when changing the currency | The currency is changed as expected | High | 1 | [https://academybugs.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/22.png](https://academybugs.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/22.png) |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  | 
BG13 | In this bug, the Sign In button overlaps the footer. | Open https://academybugs.com
Click the Find Bugs link on the navigation bar
Open a product with no color selection options
Scroll down to the bottom of the right side menu | The Sign In button overlaps the footer | The Sign In button is above the footer | Low | 3 | [https://academybugs.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/F9.png](https://academybugs.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/F9.png) |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  | 
BG14 | In this bug, the page becomes unresponsive when clicking on the Post Comment button. | Open https://academybugs.com
Click the Find Bugs link on the navigation bar
Open a product
Scroll down to the Leave a Reply section
Fill out the comment form
Click "Post Comment" | The page becomes unresponsive when clicking on "Post Comment" | The comment is posted under the product | High | 1 | [https://academybugs.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/23.png](https://academybugs.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/23.png) |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  | 
BG15 | In this bug, the short description and description of the product are not in English. | Open https://academybugs.com
Click the Find Bugs link on the navigation bar
Open a product | The short description and description of the product are not in English | The short description and description of the product are in English | Medium | 2 | [https://academybugs.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/Find-13.png](https://academybugs.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/Find-13.png) |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  | 
BG16 | In this bug, the twitter share button in the product details page is broken. | Open https://academybugs.com
Click the Find Bugs link on the navigation bar
Open a product
Click the twitter share button | The twitter share button shows an error page | The twitter share button shows an appropriate page | Medium | 2 | [https://academybugs.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/5.png](https://academybugs.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/5.png) |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  | 
BG17 | In this bug, the My Space share page loads infinitely. | Open https://academybugs.com
Click the Find Bugs link on the navigation bar
Open a product
Click the My Space share link | My Space share page loads infinitely | The user is able to share the product through My Space | Low | 3 | [https://academybugs.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/20.png](https://academybugs.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/20.png) |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  | 
BG18 | In this bug, the yellow and orange colors of the product are misspelled. | Open https://academybugs.com
Click the Find Bugs link on the navigation bar
Open a product with color options
Choose the Yellow and Orange colors | Yellow is misspelled as "Yelow" and Orange as "Orang" | The yellow and orange colors are spelled correctly | Low | 3 | [https://academybugs.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/14.png](https://academybugs.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/14.png) |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
